title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Savills India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Savills India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
